model_sheet_authority.authority_source: Model sheets are the sole and exclusive reference for all visual attributes.
restrictions: Use the exact facial structure and features shown in the model sheets. No deviations.
Use the exact eye shapes and colors only. No substitutions.
Use the exact hair colors, lengths, styles, bangs, and accessories only. No alterations.
Use the exact clothing, fabrics, patterns, and armor only. No redesigns.
Use the exact color palettes only. No palette shifts.
Use the exact body proportions and height relationships only. No reinterpretation.
Use the exact unique identifiers only. No additions.
No invented, modified, or omitted details under any circumstances.
retrieval_emphasis: All visual attributes must be retrieved strictly and exclusively from the model sheets.
No attribute may appear unless it exists in the model sheets.
No hallucinated clothing, accessories, colors, features, or details.
Model sheet fidelity overrides all other instructions without exception.

rendering.linework: High-fidelity semi-realistic anime with tapered lines. Mandatory.
rendering.shading: Hybrid cel-shaded and painterly volumetric shading. Mandatory.

materials.surfaces: Soft, luminous rendering for organic surfaces. Mandatory.

rendering.lighting: Warm directional lighting with cool ambient fill. Mandatory.

title_card.integration: The title must be integrated into the environment. No floating overlays.
title_card.font: Font must resemble Soul Knight style. No alternate fonts.

location.environment: Taoist hermit-style utopia with trees, mountains, and clouds. No substitutions.

distribution.cluster: Characters must be tightly packed with minimal spacing. No wide gaps.

orientation.facing: All characters must face the camera in a semicircle. No alternate orientations.

back_row.description: Back micro-row positioned less than one character-width behind. Mandatory.

visibility.requirement: All characters must be fully visible. No occlusion.

model_sheet_fidelity.appearance: Appearance must match the model sheets exactly. No deviations.
model_sheet_fidelity.clothing: Clothing must match the model sheets exactly. No substitutions.
model_sheet_fidelity.detail: All model sheet details must be present. No omissions.

weapon_constraint.remove: All weapons and handheld objects must be removed. None may appear.

camera_perspective.viewpoint: Selfie taken at arm's length. Mandatory.
camera_perspective.holder: Exactly one character holds the camera. Mandatory.
camera_perspective.device_visibility: No phone or device may be visible. The device must be fully out of frame.

hair.coverage: Hair must cover one eye. No exceptions.

clip.visibility: Clip must be visible. No omission.
